svg.title: A user journey for Australian human omics research
svg.desc: A five-stage user journey diagram from Explore to Sign in, Request, Access and Analyse. The diagram uses vector icons and text labels to show a researcher discovering data, authenticating, requesting data access, receiving committee and custodian approval, and analysing study-specific data.
svg.text: A researcher user journey for Australian human omics data

text.tspan: I like that I can see
